metadata.title: AICA Plan of Action and Milestones
metadata.remarks: Contains closed remediation histories and one time-bounded cost-profile exception. Historical observations are immutable.

observations.title: Public endpoints remain enabled
observations.description: Authenticated Azure-managed service endpoints are public by design under the student-cost profile.

risks.title: Broad administrative ingress
risks.statement: Future changes could reintroduce broad ingress.

remediations.title: Remove rule
remediations.description: Removed in commit 1111111; retest RUN-002 passed.

risks.title: Indirect prompt injection
risks.description: Remediated and retested with known residual limitations.
risks.statement: Novel retrieved attacks may bypass fixed test coverage.

remediations.title: Harden retrieval boundary
remediations.description: Implemented in commit 2222222; retest RUN-002 passed 8/8 injection cases.

risks.title: Approval bypass
risks.statement: Future implementation defects could bypass confirmation.

remediations.title: Server-side confirmation binding
remediations.description: Implemented in commit 3333333; retest RUN-002 denied all negative cases.

risks.title: Evaluation gate bypass
risks.statement: Pipeline defects could permit unevaluated changes.

remediations.title: Digest-bound release gate
remediations.description: Implemented in commit 4444444; retest RUN-002 passed all mismatch cases.

risks.title: Authenticated public service endpoints
risks.description: Accepted, time-bounded deviation with compensating controls.
risks.statement: Reachable service perimeters increase abuse and denial-of-service exposure.

props.name: rationale
props.value: Private networking exceeds the CAD 25 student-project ceiling and all data is synthetic.

props.name: compensating-controls
props.value: Entra/RBAC, TLS, rate limits, maxReplicas, no anonymous data, logging, daily assessment

remediations.title: Adopt enterprise target state when trigger occurs
remediations.description: Reassess private endpoints if data classification, production use, threat profile, or budget changes.

poam-items.title: POAM-001 Remove broad RDP
poam-items.description: Completed 2026-06-07 and closed by RUN-002 fresh evidence.

poam-items.title: POAM-002 Harden indirect-injection boundary
poam-items.description: Completed 2026-06-07 and closed by all eight fixed injection retests.

poam-items.title: POAM-003 Enforce confirmation server-side
poam-items.description: Completed 2026-06-07 and closed by positive, denial, replay, expiry, and mismatch retests.

poam-items.title: POAM-004 Bind evaluation to deployment digest
poam-items.description: Completed 2026-06-07 and closed by matching and mismatching manifest tests.

poam-items.title: POAM-005 Review public-endpoint exception
poam-items.description: EXC-001 is accepted through 2026-09-01 and reviewed monthly; expiry automatically reopens the decision.
